main.profile_text: Senior Frontend Engineer with 10+ years of experience building high-impact interfaces for leading companies in Latin America and globally. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and scalable architectures with a focus on performance, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), and accessibility. In 2026, I natively integrated AI into my workflow (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, LLMs), allowing me to execute with greater speed and precision without sacrificing code quality. I have built products used by millions of users on platforms like Mercado Libre and Mercado Pago. Focused on innovation, clean code, and measurable impact.

metrics.label: Users reached in Mercado Libre LATAM

jobs.role: Senior Frontend Engineer · Fintech & Payment Systems
jobs.company: Mercado Libre · Mercado Pago Credit Card
jobs.period:
Jul 2021 — Feb 2026
4 yrs 7 mos
bullets: Lead development of mission-critical fintech backoffice applications for Mercado Pago Credit Card, handling settlement, reconciliation, and financial reporting modules processing millions of daily transactions across LATAM with regulatory compliance (PCI-DSS, AML).

Spearheaded complete redesign of primary payment dashboard serving 12M+ active users, improving conversion rates and reducing drop-off in critical financial operations through enterprise payment UX patterns.

Implemented scalable fintech architectures with React 19 + TypeScript + Node.js + SSR, ensuring high availability, performance (Lighthouse 95+), and multi-region CI/CD pipelines meeting Mercado Libre enterprise standards.
Integrated GitHub Copilot + LLMs into workflows to accelerate payment feature delivery, reduce technical debt, and iterate rapidly on evolving financial regulations in real-time.
Ensured Accessibility compliance across all money-movement interfaces, promoting financial inclusion for underserved LATAM users through accessible fintech design.
Collaborated with Compliance, Risk & Legal teams to integrate real-time security checks and data validation in backoffice interfaces (KYC, AML, fraud prevention).

jobs.period:
Sep 2016 — Jul 2021
4 yrs 10 mos
bullets: Developed high-availability user interfaces for the Disney Cruise Line (Caribbean) with Angular + TypeScript, ensuring performance and UX on a mission-critical platform.
Collaborated with the Wunderman Thompson (VML) team on frontend solutions for high-traffic global campaigns, focusing on performance, engineering, and load optimization.
Lead frontend development for fuel logistics clients, ensuring architectural scalability and cross-browser coverage.
Applied Agile/Scrum methodologies in distributed international teams, delivering sprints with high cadence and quality.
Developed interactive webapps using AngularJS, PHP, and Node.js for home automation and IoT solutions.
Maintained and improved full-stack web platforms, integrating back-end and front-end for custom client solutions.
Built ByPeople, a curated network for developers and designers with over 10,000 resources (freebies, plugins, snippets) updated daily — bypeople.com.
Developed the institutional web platform for UNAB, supporting academic and administrative units using Drupal as the core CMS.

projects: Minder (2026) — Tinder-like SPA rating app. Redesigned with React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Zustand, and IMDb API. Deployed on Firebase. AI-generated logo. minder-vite2026.web.app
Vibe Watcher AI — Proactive monitoring script using Gemini CLI to document codebase changes in real-time. Open Source on GitHub.
